title: Recipe For A Suffragette:
content:
To the power that already lies in her hands
        You add equal rights with the gents;
     You'll find votes that used to bring two or three plunks,
        Marked down to ninety-eight cents.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Recipe For A Suffragette:"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
